title: Log MPO tensor train baseline at r=16 (1.3193 BPB)
author: chinmaypatwardhan-ops

data.description: Replaced dense linear feedforward matrices in the MLP block with a low-rank Matrix Product Operator (MPO) tensor-train decomposition.

novel_contributions: Replaced standard dense MLP feedforward matrices with a low-rank MPO tensor-train decomposition
Initialized the MPO cores at rank 16
Reduced parameter footprint from 124M to 12.6M parameters
Achieved 1.3193 val_bpb under high compression constraints
